CustomField.description: Let the user knows which data is missing
CustomField.formula: IF( Data_Quality_Score__c =100,"All Account Details Captured", "Missing: "& IF( ISPICKVAL( Distributor_Type__c,""),"Distributor Type, ","")&""& IF(ISPICKVAL(Sub_Type__c,""), "Sub-Type, ","")&""& IF(ISPICKVAL(In__c,""), "Investment Decision, ","")&""& IF(ISPICKVAL(Final_Distribution__c,""), "Final Distribution, ","")&""& IF(ISPICKVAL(LegalForm__c,""), "Legal Form, ","")&""& IF(OR(LEN(BillingCity)=0,LEN(BillingStreet)=0,LEN(BillingCountry)=0),"Complete Address,","")&""& IF( LEN(Phone) = 0, "Phone, ",""))
CustomField.label: Data Quality Description
